auth.label: API Key
auth.description: TheirStack API key sent as a Bearer token.

actions.name: get_credit_balance
actions.description: Retrieve the authenticated TheirStack team's current credit balance.

inputSchema.description: No input is required to retrieve TheirStack credit balance.

ui_credits.description: Number of UI credits available to the team.

used_ui_credits.description: Number of UI credits used in the current billing cycle.

api_credits.description: Number of API credits available to the team.

used_api_credits.description: Number of API credits used in the current billing cycle.

anyOf.description: Earliest expiration timestamp among invoices with remaining credits.

outputSchema.description: TheirStack credit balance for the authenticated team.

actions.name: list_technographics
actions.description: List technologies and buying-intent keywords detected by TheirStack for a company.

company_domain.description: Company domain, URL, or email domain to identify the company.

company_name.description: Exact case-sensitive company name to identify the company.

company_linkedin_url.description: LinkedIn company URL to identify the company.

keyword_slug_or.description: Only return technologies or buying-intent topics matching any of these keyword slugs.

keyword_category_slug_or.description: Only return keywords from any of these keyword category slugs.

confidence_or.description: Only return technologies with any of these confidence levels.

min_jobs.description: Minimum number of jobs found for each technology or keyword.

max_jobs.description: Maximum number of jobs found for each technology or keyword.

first_date_found_gte.description: Only return technologies first found on or after this YYYY-MM-DD date.

first_date_found_lte.description: Only return technologies first found on or before this YYYY-MM-DD date.

last_date_found_gte.description: Only return technologies last found on or after this YYYY-MM-DD date.

last_date_found_lte.description: Only return technologies last found on or before this YYYY-MM-DD date.

page.description: Page number for page-based pagination. TheirStack pages start at 0.

offset.description: Number of results to skip for offset-based pagination.

include_total_results.description: When true, TheirStack calculates total result counts. This can slow down large searches.

field.description: Field to sort technographic results by.

desc.description: Whether to sort the field in descending order.

items.description: Sort option for TheirStack technographic results.

inputSchema.description: List technologies and buying-intent keywords TheirStack detected for a company.

items.description: A TheirStack record. The object keeps the upstream fields returned by the API.

technologies.description: Technology and buying-intent records returned by TheirStack.

anyOf.description: Total number of results when requested.
Total number of companies when requested.
Number of results omitted because the account lacked enough credits.
Number of companies omitted because the account lacked enough credits.

metadata.description: Pagination and count metadata returned by TheirStack.

actions.name: search_companies
actions.description: Search TheirStack companies by firmographic, hiring, and technographic filters.

company_domain_or.description: Only return companies matching any of these domains, URLs, or email domains.

company_linkedin_url_or.description: Only return companies whose LinkedIn URL matches any of these values.

company_name_or.description: Only return companies whose name exactly matches any of these case-sensitive values.

company_name_partial_match_or.description: Return companies whose name contains any of these substrings, case-insensitively.

company_country_code_or.description: Only return companies headquartered in any of these ISO2 country codes.

company_keyword_slug_or.description: Keyword or buying-intent slugs mentioned by matching companies in their jobs.

company_technology_slug_or.description: Technology slugs mentioned by matching companies in their jobs.

page.description: Page number for page-based pagination. TheirStack pages start at 0.

offset.description: Number of results to skip for offset-based pagination.

include_total_results.description: When true, TheirStack calculates total result counts. This can slow down large searches.

field.description: Field to sort company search results by.

desc.description: Whether to sort the field in descending order.

items.description: Sort option for TheirStack company search results.

order_by.description: Sort options for company search results.

inputSchema.description: Search TheirStack companies by firmographic, hiring, and technographic filters.

items.description: A TheirStack record. The object keeps the upstream fields returned by the API.

anyOf.description: Total number of results when requested.
Total number of companies when requested.
Number of results omitted because the account lacked enough credits.
Number of companies omitted because the account lacked enough credits.

metadata.description: Pagination and count metadata returned by TheirStack.

actions.name: search_jobs
actions.description: Search TheirStack job postings with company, title, keyword, location, and posting date filters.

company_domain_or.description: Only return jobs from companies matching any of these domains, URLs, or email domains.

company_linkedin_url_or.description: Only return jobs from companies whose LinkedIn URL matches any of these values.

company_name_or.description: Only return jobs from companies whose name exactly matches any of these case-sensitive values.

job_title_or.description: Keyword-based patterns to match job titles, case-insensitively.

job_description_contains_or.description: Whole words to search for in job descriptions. Matching is case-insensitive unless the word is uppercase.

job_country_code_or.description: Two-letter ISO country codes for job locations.

posted_at_max_age_days.description: Maximum age in days for job posting dates. Use 0 for jobs posted today.

posted_at_gte.description: Only return jobs published on or after this YYYY-MM-DD date.

posted_at_lte.description: Only return jobs published on or before this YYYY-MM-DD date.

remote.description: When true, only show remote jobs. When false, only show non-remote jobs.

page.description: Page number for page-based pagination. TheirStack pages start at 0.

offset.description: Number of results to skip for offset-based pagination.

include_total_results.description: When true, TheirStack calculates total result counts. This can slow down large searches.

field.description: Field to sort job search results by.

desc.description: Whether to sort the field in descending order.

items.description: Sort option for TheirStack job search results.

order_by.description: Sort options for job search results.

inputSchema.description: Search TheirStack job postings by company, title, keyword, location, and posting date filters.

items.description: A TheirStack record. The object keeps the upstream fields returned by the API.

anyOf.description: Total number of results when requested.
Total number of companies when requested.
Number of results omitted because the account lacked enough credits.
Number of companies omitted because the account lacked enough credits.

metadata.description: Pagination and count metadata returned by TheirStack.
